message: I was charged twice this month for my subscription. Can you please look into this?

message: I just noticed my plan renewed at a higher price than what I originally signed up for. The original was IDR 500,000/month and now it's IDR 650,000. Why?

message: Something odd — my credit card was declined for the subscription payment but I can still log in and use everything. Is that normal?

expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

message: Our tax advisor is asking about the nature of the service for VAT categorization purposes. Specifically, they need to know if this is classified as a digital service, consulting service, or software license, because each has different tax treatment in our jurisdiction.
expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

message: I'm preparing our annual tax filing and I need a summary of all tax amounts charged across our invoices for the 2025 fiscal year. Specifically, I need the breakdown by tax type (PPN vs WHT if applicable) and the total taxable base. Is this something your billing system can generate?
expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

message: We have a complex tax situation — our holding company is in the Netherlands, the contracting entity is in Indonesia, and the end users are in Australia. The invoice currently applies Indonesian PPN but our tax counsel believes it should be zero-rated given the service delivery location. Can someone from your finance team clarify the tax treatment?
expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

message: Following up on our earlier conversation about WHT — our local regulations require us to withhold 2% on payments to domestic vendors. I need to confirm: does your company accept withholding tax deductions, and if so, what documentation do you need from us (bukti potong, etc.)?
expectedLesson: Tax or VAT questions on invoices

message: Hi, I made a payment on June 10 for my subscription renewal but I never received any invoice or receipt by email. I've also checked the billing section in my account and there's nothing there either. Could you send me the invoice for that payment? Thanks, Mark.

message: Good morning, I hope you're doing well. I wanted to bring to your attention that our latest subscription invoice (INV-2026-8891) still references our former business address and trade name. As we completed our rebranding in Q1, all financial documents should now reflect the updated details. Could you kindly arrange for a corrected invoice at your earliest convenience? Many thanks.

message: Not happy. My renewal went from USD 199 to USD 249 with ZERO heads up. I've been a loyal customer for 3 years. This is not how you treat people. Considering cancelling.

message:
We prepaid for 12 months but are shutting down operations after month 5. Requesting a refund for the remaining 7 months. Total paid was IDR 12,000,000 so we're looking for approximately IDR 7,000,000 back. Please process this as soon as possible.

Best regards,
Pak Hasan
expectedLesson: Refund request for unused service period
